subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm in the Covenant! Thy most eloquent letter hath been received, and it beareth splendid testimony to thy steadfastness and constancy [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه بلیغ وصول یافت دلیل جلیل بر ثبوت و رسوخ بود در هر دمی
subcodes.subjects: @predictions and prophecies, @prayer for protection, @firmness in the Covenant, @martyrs and martyrdom
